HOME.TITLE: Welcome to SparkPlan
HOME.SUBTITLE: Transform your ideas into actionable plans using AI and automation.

HERO.TITLE: Transform Your Ideas into Action Plans
HERO.SUBTITLE: SparkPlan uses AI to turn your thoughts into structured, actionable plans — automatically saved to your Google Drive.

HOW_IT_WORKS.HEADING: How It Works
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_1_DESC: Secure authentication using your Google account.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_2_DESC: Describe your idea in any language — keep it simple or detailed.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_3_DESC: Our AI creates a structured plan with steps, resources, and timelines.
HOW_IT_WORKS.STEP_4_DESC: Your plan is automatically saved to your Google Drive in a dedicated folder.

FEATURES.HEADING: Why SparkPlan?
FEATURES.FEATURE_1_DESC: Generate comprehensive plans in seconds, not hours.
FEATURES.FEATURE_2_DESC: Write in English or Spanish — AI adapts to your language.
FEATURES.FEATURE_3_DESC: All plans are securely stored in your personal Google Drive.

CTA.HEADING: Ready to Bring Your Ideas to Life?
CTA.TEXT: Join thousands of creators, entrepreneurs, and thinkers using SparkPlan.

WELCOME.SUBTITLE: Ready to turn your next idea into reality?

IDEA_FORM.TITLE: Share Your Idea
IDEA_FORM.LABEL: Describe your idea
IDEA_FORM.PLACEHOLDER: Example: A mobile app to help people find local farmers markets and connect directly with producers...
IDEA_FORM.MIN_LENGTH_ERROR: Please write at least 50 characters to help us understand your idea better.
IDEA_FORM.SUCCESS_MESSAGE: Your plan has been generated successfully!
IDEA_FORM.ERROR_MESSAGE: Something went wrong. Please try again.
IDEA_FORM.TIP_1: Write in any language you prefer — the plan will be generated in that language
IDEA_FORM.TIP_2: Focus on describing your core idea, not formatting or structure
IDEA_FORM.TIP_3: Be specific about your goals and target audience
IDEA_FORM.TIP_4: Don't worry about length — quality over quantity
